pages.raw_text:
Unless the state board of tax
commissioners compromises with
the people of Pierce county in the
matter of finding the proper valua-
ton for the Northern Pacific prop
critics in that county the contro-
versy will be carried into court. It
is claimed the valuations are un-
reasonably low.


The valuation placed upon the
roads of that county is based upon
certain per cent of the entire
valuation, the same as all other
property is given its valuation. The
same rule has been applied by the
state board in regulating the values
in all counties of the state.


The valuation of Spokane coun-
ty was figured upon a basis of 81
per cent of it's real value. This is
the highest rate per cent of any
county in the state.
